user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Light, quick breakfast in the hotel dining area or grab-and-go from the hotel cafe — perfect for a short window before the 9:00 AM meeting.

insertion_point.reasoning: User's first meeting is at 9:00 AM and Day 2 has no breakfast. Insert at position 0 before the 9:00 AM Client Kickoff Meeting so they have a quick meal at 8:00–8:30 AM with minimal travel.
